name: learnwy-skills
description: Personal skills repository with rslib-bundled CLI scripts

scripts.check: npm run typecheck && npm run build
scripts.release: git push origin main && pnpx skills install -g -y learnwy/skills && npm run install:hooks
scripts.install:llm-wiki: node skills/llm-wiki/scripts/hooks/install.cjs install --config skills/llm-wiki/hooks.json --scope global --target both
scripts.install:hooks: npm run install:english-learner && npm run install:llm-wiki && npm run install:prompt-optimizer
scripts.uninstall:llm-wiki: node skills/llm-wiki/scripts/hooks/install.cjs uninstall --skill-id llm-wiki --scope global --target both
